heading: Availability of federally gathered unenhanced data
label: 60132 Availability of federally gathered unenhanced data
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)60132.15 U.S.C. 5632, , .Pub. L. 102–555, title III, § 302106 Stat. 4174Oct. 28, 1992In subsection (b), the word “affect” is substituted for “effect” to correct an error in the law.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)60132.15 U.S.C. 5632, , .Pub. L. 102–555, title III, § 302106 Stat. 4174Oct. 28, 1992In subsection (b), the word “affect” is substituted for “effect” to correct an error in the law.

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: All unenhanced land remote sensing data gathered and owned by the United States Government, including unenhanced data gathered under the technology demonstration program carried out pursuant to , shall be made available to users in a timely fashion.section 60133 of this title

children.heading: .—Protection for Commercial Data Distributor
children.label: b .—Protection for Commercial Data Distributor
children.text: The President shall seek to ensure that unenhanced data gathered under the technology demonstration program carried out pursuant to shall, to the extent practicable, be made available on terms that would not adversely affect the commercial market for unenhanced data gathered by the Landsat 6 spacecraft.section 60133 of this title
